title: KKHSOU Results 2026 Key Highlights

detail.title: KKHSOU Results 2026 Key Highlights
detail.short_info: Krishna Kanta Handiqui State Open University Result 2026 declared for BA 1st Semester (2017-19, 2020, 2021-23), BBA 1st Semester (2020-23), BCA 1st Semester (2019, 2020-23) and DY 2nd Semester (old) on the official website - kkhsou.ac.in on 31-03-2026. Check the direct link provided here and the steps to download the KKHSOU result.

content.text: Krishna Kanta Handiqui State Open University has released the KKHSOU Result 2026 for multiple undergraduate semester examinations for different batches. The latest updates dated 31-03-2026 include Result of the BBA 1st Semester (2020-23), Result of the BCA 1st Semester (2020-23), Result of the BCA 1st Semester (2019), Result of the BA 1st Semester (2021-23), Result of the BA 1st Semester (2020), Result of the BA 1st Semester (2017-19) and Result of the DY 2nd Semester (old). KKHSOU Result 2026 has been announced online on the official website - kkhsou.ac.in - through the dedicated results/news page and the e‑marksheet system.

Learners can open the respective result notices from the Results section, access the detailed PDFs or e‑marksheet links and then enter their enrollment number to download individual marksheets. After viewing subject wise marks and pass/fail status, they should verify personal and course details carefully and contact KKHSOU if there is any discrepancy or issue with the displayed result.

KKHSOU has simultaneously published first semester results for BA, BBA and BCA programmes across multiple admission cycles along with DY 2nd semester (old scheme) outcomes, giving a consolidated view for open and distance learners. These results are part of the ongoing 2026 academic session updates that also include earlier releases for BA 2nd/4th semester, BBA/BCA 3rd and 5th semester and PG courses.

KKHSOU lists all declared results in the Results section, where each entry opens a detailed news page containing result PDFs/e‑marksheet access. Learners can use the main results URL to reach any of the BA, BBA, BCA 1st semester or DY 2nd semester results.
Follow the steps below to check and download your KKHSOU BA/BBA/BCA 1st Semester or DY 2nd Semester Result 2026:

items: Go to the KKHSOU results page: https://kkhsou.ac.in/web/index_news_all.php?c=dE9hTkRwd05wc3RrV1JjaTBDQ2VBZz09.

In the results list, locate your course result link, such as: RESULT OF THE BBA - I SEMESTER (2020-23) RESULT OF THE BCA - I SEMESTER (2020-23) or (2019) RESULT OF THE BA - I SEMESTER (2021-23/2020/2017-19) RESULT OF THE DY - II SEMESTER (old).
RESULT OF THE BBA - I SEMESTER (2020-23)
RESULT OF THE BCA - I SEMESTER (2020-23) or (2019)
RESULT OF THE BA - I SEMESTER (2021-23/2020/2017-19)
RESULT OF THE DY - II SEMESTER (old).
Click on the appropriate result link to open the detailed news/result page.

On that page, either: Open the attached PDF and use Ctrl+F with your Enrollment/Roll Number to find your marks, or Click the link to the e‑marksheet system (https://eservices.kkhsou.ac.in/e-marksheet/) and select your exam, then enter your Enrollment Number and other required details.
Open the attached PDF and use Ctrl+F with your Enrollment/Roll Number to find your marks, or
Click the link to the e‑marksheet system (https://eservices.kkhsou.ac.in/e-marksheet/) and select your exam, then enter your Enrollment Number and other required details.
View your subject wise marks/grades, total marks and result status, then download or print your marksheet for academic and official use.
Preserve the e‑marksheet and PDF until you receive official hard copies, especially for re-registration, higher semester admission and job applications.
